events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: copper pipe unreamed with visible burr. This is a defect. IPC requires reaming copper tube to remove burrs. This is non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision: fail. Risk: medium (flow restriction, turbulence, erosion). Work stage: rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 85. Value: 0 (no numeric reading requested, but visible burr). Confidence high.
